programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: Marjorie has collected items from thrift stores and estate sales over the years for various projects, which has led to a massive amount of clutter in her home.

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: After discovering that his partner was stealing from him, undergoing a necessary heart surgery and facing many other adversities, successful artist Bob becomes a recluse, buying antiques to fill up his 7,000-square-foot Victorian mansion.

programme.title: Hoarders
programme.desc: Between dumpster diving, weekly swap meet purchases and occasional yard sale finds, John collects a massive amount of clutter over the years and openly admits that he feels trapped by his hoard.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: In Cleveland, Ray is ready to move back home-until he discovers an intruder linked to his previous tenant has taken over his house; when Flash and his team step inside, it's anything but a routine squatter removal job; the house is uninhabitable, and the danger runs far deeper than expected.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: During renovations, Andrew's Philadelphia home was taken over by squatters who moved in, changed the locks, and installed security cameras; what begins as a straightforward case quickly escalates into a tense standoff with authorities, as Flash and his team attempt to reclaim the property without any help from the neighborhood.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: In Washington, health issues forced Zachary out of his dream home; he rented it to seemingly trustworthy tenants-only to realize they were alleged serial squatters who stopped paying and refused to leave; in one of his toughest fights yet, can Flash and his team take this home back?

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: In Cle Elum, Washington, Casey lost her dream home to a stranger who claimed it as her own for over 4 months and even tried to rent rooms out to other people for profit; but when Flash and his team move in, will their tactics be enough for this squatter to finally leave once and for all?

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: In Garland, Texas, Flash Shelton and his team help a family repossess their deceased brother's home from a squatter who moved in on the day that their brother died.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: The team head to Conroe, Texas, to help a grieving family reclaim their late grandmother's home from a squatter couple who moved in after her passing; tensions run high when the couple resists leaving.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: Flash heads to Philadelphia to help Paul, who returns from a stint in Vegas to start a family with his fiancée, only to find a stranger has taken over his Pennsylvania home; when Flash confronts multiple occupants, tensions mount, culminating in a boiling standoff.

programme.title: Squatters
programme.desc: Justin and Ashley's plans to sell their home in Auburn, Washington are thrown into chaos when the property is overrun by intruders; when Flash and his team arrive to remove the squatters, what should be a routine civil matter quickly turns criminal, as police descend on the property upending the entire operation.

programme.title: WWE Rivals
programme.desc: The immortal Hulk Hogan and Ultimate Warrior are the premier real-life superheroes that dominate an era; two forces of good collide inside the squared circle.

programme.title: WWE Rivals
programme.desc: In 1996, "Stone Cold" Steve Austin was climbing to the top of the WWE roster; however, one man stood in his path: Bret "Hitman" Hart, one of greatest wrestlers at the time.

programme.title: WWE Rivals
programme.desc: The early '90s rivalry between Jake Roberts and Randy Savage.

programme.title: WWE Rivals
programme.desc: The feud between Triple H and Batista is dissected by a roundtable of experts including Freddie Prinze Jr., Kevin Nash, Natalya, Bayley and John Bradshaw Layfield.

programme.title: WWE Rivals
programme.desc: After dominating most of the WWE roster in the mid 90s, Undertaker needed an opponent who could push him both physically and mentally; Mankind, aka Mick Foley, became that perfect adversary for The Deadman.

programme.title: WWE LFG
programme.desc: After receiving deflating feedback last match, Chris Island puts in extra effort and looks to turn his fortunes around when he faces off against the newest member of LFG, the sensation from Madrid, Jaime Garcia; Kevin Owens helps Nathan Cranton and Mike Derudder on their character development; in the main event, Zena Sterling looks to Booker T to help add an edge as she takes on Nikkita Lyons.

programme.title: WWE's Greatest Moments
programme.desc: We celebrate the top moments from SmackDown's second decade; features the Steel Cage clash between Jeff Hardy and CM Punk, Edge's shocking cash-in on The Undertaker, AJ Styles capturing the WWE Championship in Britain, The Rock making his return to the house he built and more.

programme.title: WWE's Greatest Moments
programme.desc: Sometimes in the unpredictable world of WWE, rivalries become too personal to be settled inside the ring and superstars sometimes find the backstage area more suitable to settle their differences; witness some of the most tumultuous backstage assaults in WWE history with moments featuring The Rock, Hollywood Hogan, The Undertaker, "The American Nightmare" Cody Rhodes and so much more!

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.desc: George meets a couple turning a ship's wheelhouse into a glamping pod, revisits a designer from series one to see his eco-builds, and unveils his cabin in the sky.

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Channel 4's flagship news programme. Including the weather.

programme.title: F1 Barcelona-Catalunya GP Highlights
programme.desc: Ten years after Verstappen's first ever GP win, can he do it again on the same track? He'll need to beat a dominant Mercedes team to make that dream come true.

programme.title: Free Nelson Mandela
programme.desc: The extraordinary story of Nelson Mandela's journey from activist to revolutionary prisoner. As Mandela is jailed for life in 1964, activists and musicians rise against apartheid.

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The Inheritance, You Bet! On Tour, KPopped, Emmerdale, The Guest, 90 Day Fiancé UK, This Morning (roast dinner) and ITV News (Angela Rayner).

programme.title: Boiling Point
programme.desc: Stephen Graham stars as a top chef spiralling inexorably towards destruction, as his life descends into chaos over one night's service at a fancy London restaurant.

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits South Philadelphia, where struggling family-run restaurant Chiarella's is pushing owners Tommy and Dina DeFino's marriage to the brink.

programme.title: The Dog House
programme.desc: Albie the Jack Russell has a second chance of a home with 10-year-old George. And a mistreated lurcher called Sam needs some home comforts. Will visitors see past his size.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: When Homer loses all the family's money with an unwise investment, he becomes a human guinea pig to earn some cash - and that's when he becomes extremely intelligent..

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Sideshow Bob swears revenge on Krusty for accidentally erasing the first 10 years of their programme.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: After cheating in the Springfield Marathon, Bart is rescued from an angry mob by a record producer and is recruited for a new boy band.

programme.title: Sarah Beeny's New Life in the Country
programme.desc: With most of the house now built, Sarah and Graham turn to the finer details of the interior, including a family portrait wall.

programme.title: Countdown

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Maggie makes an important proposal to Cliff, but he's afflicted with a puzzling medical condition that strikes when he's faced with commitment.

programme.title: Cheers

programme.title: Inside the Tower of London
programme.desc: A new beefeater joins the ranks, there's remarkable revelations from the Tower's archives, and special celebrations for the anniversary of King Charles's coronation.

programme.title: Inside the Tower of London
